overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-slicked futuristic metropolis. The player moves along neon-lit sidewalks past towering corporate buildings before crossing a wide intersection dominated by massive holographic billboards and rotating advertisement towers.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk beside corporate tower with vertical blue neon trim

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk beside a tall building with glowing blue neon edges, glancing at the street traffic

notable_agents.action: woman in red crop top and dark pants walking toward the camera

entered.detail: tall dark corporate tower with continuous vertical cyan neon light strip running up the corner edge
rain-slicked multi-lane road with reflective surface showing neon light reflections
tall palm tree planted in sidewalk median strip
tall pole with bright horizontal LED light fixture
cluster of illuminated high-rise buildings with various neon advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a narrow city sidewalk at night, flanked by a massive corporate building with distinctive blue neon edging on the right and a wet street on the left. Sparse pedestrians pass by, including a woman in red walking toward the camera, while the reflective pavement mirrors the vibrant neon lights of the distant skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial storefront zone approaching major intersection

events.description: passing the blue neon building and entering commercial area with ground-level storefronts

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past the AUROCH storefront, approaching the crosswalk at the major intersection

notable_agents.action: man in white tank top walking ahead toward the crosswalk

entered.detail: commercial entrance with green neon 'AUROCH' signage and red door
massive digital screen mounted on building facade displaying animated advertisements
yellow tactile paving leading to street crossing

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the enclosed sidewalk to a more open commercial area featuring the AUROCH storefront with its green neon signage. The camera approaches a crosswalk, following a man in a white tank top, while large vertical digital billboards illuminate the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with holographic advertising towers and rotating billboards

events.description: stepping onto the crosswalk and entering the wide open intersection plaza
crossing the multi-lane street alongside other pedestrians while vehicles wait at the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection with a group of pedestrians, looking around at the massive surrounding billboards

notable_agents.action: couple walking side by side crossing the street ahead of the camera

entered.detail: massive cylindrical structure with multiple rotating digital screens displaying advertisements
multi-story building with red facade and white window frames at the center of the intersection
yellow-railed elevated walkway crossing above the street level
enormous vertical digital billboard showing 'CHOOH2' and other advertisements
tall building facade covered in massive digital displays

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a vast, brightly lit intersection dominated by a massive circular rotating billboard structure at its center. The camera crosses the wet asphalt crosswalk surrounded by towering digital advertisements on all sides, including a distinctive red building and yellow overhead pedestrian bridge, while navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic crossing in the same direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a narrow, neon-lined corridor of a corporate district into a vast, brightly lit urban intersection. It begins with a walk along a rain-slicked sidewalk flanked by a massive building with blue neon edging, where the reflective pavement mirrors the distant skyline as a woman in red passes by. As the camera moves forward, the enclosed feeling of the sidewalk gives way to a more open commercial area, passing the green neon signage of an AUROCH storefront and following a man in a white tank top toward a crosswalk. The scene then expands into a wide intersection dominated by a massive circular rotating billboard and towering digital advertisements on all sides. Finally, the camera crosses the wet asphalt under a yellow pedestrian bridge and past a distinctive red building, navigating through a crowd of pedestrians amidst the glow of the metropolis.
